title: RestLib Resource Configuration
description: JSON schema for configuring a single RestLib REST API resource in a root-level JSON file or appsettings section.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for IDE autocomplete when authoring standalone resource files.

Name.description: Unique resource name used during registration.

EntityType.description: Assembly-qualified CLR API model type name used by AddRestLibFromFolder. For single-model resources, this remains the entity type.

KeyProperty.description: Entity property name used as the primary key. Defaults to 'Id' when omitted.

AllowAnonymousAll.description: When true, all operations allow anonymous access.

Policies.description: Authorization policies required for specific operations. Keys are operation names, values are arrays of policy names.

Filtering.description: API model property names or dot-separated nested reference-property paths that can be filtered on via query parameters (equality only). Names are converted to snake_case per segment in the query string, joined with dots (for example, Customer.Email -> customer.email). Collection-valued paths are not supported. For operator-based filtering, use FilteringOperators instead.

FilteringOperators.description: Per-property filter operator configuration. Keys are API model property names or dot-separated nested reference-property paths, values are arrays of allowed operator names or preset names. Query parameter names use snake_case per segment joined with dots. Collection-valued paths are not supported. Valid operators: eq, neq, gt, lt, gte, lte, contains, starts_with, ends_with, in. Valid presets: equality, comparison, string, all.

Sorting.description: API model property names or dot-separated nested reference-property paths that can be sorted on via the sort query parameter. Names are converted to snake_case per segment and joined with dots (for example, Customer.Name -> customer.name). Collection-valued paths are not supported.

DefaultSort.description: Default sort expression applied when the client does not provide a sort parameter (e.g. 'name:asc,price:desc' or 'customer.name:asc'). All referenced fields must also be listed in Sorting.

FieldSelection.description: API model property names or dot-separated nested reference-property paths that can be selected via the fields query parameter. Names are converted to snake_case per segment in the query string, joined with dots. Nested selections serialize back as dotted keys (for example, customer.email). Collection-valued paths are not supported.

Search.description: API model string property names or dot-separated nested reference-property paths that participate in OR-of-contains collection search. Search uses the configured query parameter, which defaults to q. Collection-valued paths are not supported.

Validation.description: JSON-declared validation rules keyed by API-model CLR property name.

operationSelection.description: Controls which CRUD operations are enabled. Use either Include or Exclude, not both.

Include.description: Only these operations will be mapped. All others are disabled.

Exclude.description: These operations will not be mapped. All others remain enabled.

DbType.description: Assembly-qualified CLR DB model type name.

Mapper.description: Mapper implementation type name used to select a registered C# mapper.

Auto.description: When true, RestLib uses the built-in strict reflection mapper for exact same-name, same-type properties.

HookModel.description: Selects whether named JSON hooks run against the API or DB model.

keyConfiguration.description: Ordered two-part composite key configuration. Use this instead of KeyProperty for composite-key resources.

Properties.description: Exactly two CLR property names that make up the key, in route order.

RouteParameters.description: Exactly two route parameter names used by the resource route, in route order.

Tag.description: Shared tag name for grouping endpoints in the OpenAPI document.

Deprecated.description: Marks all operations as deprecated in the OpenAPI document.

DeprecationMessage.description: Message displayed when the resource is deprecated.

Summaries.description: Short summary text for each operation in the OpenAPI document.

Descriptions.description: Detailed description text for each operation in the OpenAPI document.

QueryParameter.description: Query parameter name used for search. Defaults to 'q'.

CaseSensitive.description: When true, search uses case-sensitive string matching.

rateLimiting.description: Rate limiting policy configuration. Requires the application to register rate limiting policies via AddRateLimiter() and wire the middleware via UseRateLimiter().

Default.description: Default rate limiting policy name applied to all operations. Per-operation overrides and disabled operations take precedence.

ByOperation.description: Per-operation rate limiting policy overrides. Keys are operation names, values are policy names.

batchConfiguration.description: Batch operations configuration. Enables bulk create, update, patch, and/or delete via POST /prefix/batch.

Actions.description: Batch actions to enable. If empty or omitted, all actions (Create, Update, Patch, Delete) are enabled.

hookConfiguration.description: Named hook handlers wired to pipeline stages. Hooks must be registered in C# via AddNamedHook/AddNamedErrorHook before use.

OnRequestReceived.description: Hooks that run when a request is first received.

OnRequestValidated.description: Hooks that run after request validation.

BeforeResponse.description: Hooks that run before the response is sent.

OnError.description: Hooks that run when an exception occurs.

hookStage.description: Configuration for a standard hook pipeline stage.

Default.description: Hook names that always run for this stage, regardless of operation.

ByOperation.description: Hook names that run only for specific operations.

errorHookStage.description: Configuration for the error hook pipeline stage.

Default.description: Error hook names that always run, regardless of operation.

ByOperation.description: Error hook names that run only for specific operations.

validationRule.description: Validation rules applied to a single CLR property.

Required.description: When true, null and empty-string values are rejected.

Min.description: Minimum numeric value allowed for the property.

Max.description: Maximum numeric value allowed for the property.

Pattern.description: Regular expression pattern a string value must match.

Email.description: When true, the string value must be a valid email address.
